◈
Get started in 2 steps
TradeQuill tracks trades per account — create one first, then upload your history.
1
Create account
Name it, pick the type (Prop, Live, or Demo), set starting balance
→
2
Upload trades
Click ⋯ on your account → Manual Upload → drop your broker CSV
Supported: MT4/MT5, TradeZella, or any CSV with Date + Pair + P&L columns
Supported imports: MT4/MT5, TradeZella, or any CSV with Date + Pair + P&L

P&L by Emotion i Calm trades = edge. FOMO & revenge = leaks.

—

followed plan
Grade Distribution — A+ trades should be your most profitable
Mistake Tags — Recurring patterns costing you money
Model Performance — Which models make you money
Pro Trend vs Counter Trend — Are you fighting the trend?
Discipline Trend i
Rolling 10-trade average. Green zone = elite (80+), yellow = average (50-80), red = tilt (<50)
Emotion → P&L Impact i
Average P&L per trade by emotion. Your most profitable mental state should be your default.
Tilt Timeline i
Spot your tilt zones — clusters of red bars after losses signal revenge/FOMO patterns.
Calm/Focused Confident/Neutral Anxious/Uncertain FOMO/Revenge/Frustrated
Plan Adherence by Week i
Target: 80%+ every week. Dips below 60% = re-read your trading rules.

Playbook
Define your edge · Build setups · Track what works
0
SETUPS
0
ACTIVE
—
AVG WIN RATE
—
BEST SETUP
Pick a starter template to jumpstart your playbook. Customize everything after import.
ICT / SMC
Smart Money Concepts — market structure, order blocks, liquidity sweeps, BOS, displacement. For ICT methodology traders.
BOSOBFVGLiquidityDisplacement
Price Action
Clean chart trading — support/resistance, trend lines, candlestick patterns, breakouts, and pullbacks. No indicators needed.
S/RTrendlineEngulfingPin BarBreakout
Indicator-Based
Moving averages, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic. For traders who use technical indicators as primary confluences.
EMA CrossRSIMACDBBVolume
Supply & Demand
Zone-based trading — fresh/tested zones, rally-base-rally, drop-base-drop. Institutional order flow concepts.
Fresh ZoneRBRDBDImbalanceFlip Zone
Harmonic Patterns
Fibonacci-based pattern trading — Gartley, Bat, Butterfly, Crab, Cypher. Precise entry zones with defined risk.
GartleyBatButterflyFibPRZ
Custom from Scratch
Start with a blank canvas. Define your own context blocks, confluences, triggers, and management rules from zero.
Your rulesYour confluencesYour edge
Import a playbook template from your trading community or mentor. Enter the invite code they shared with you.
